calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. BRIAN MILES, Esq. of Miles Westbrook & Deal LLP (Tel: 925-938-4500) for plaintiff/judgment creditor The National Collection Agency, Inc. (via Zoom videoconference);
Defendant/judgment debtor JAVIER PEREGRINO (Tel: 415-728-4472) in pro per.

HEARING DETERMINING DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAVIER PEREGRINO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The claim of exemption is granted. (See CCP 704.225 [money necessary for support].)

Order signed. Copies of order mailed to the levying officer and the parties.
